parsed_output.justification:
Justin’s remarks and the subsequent dialogue suggest that Paul may be the culprit.  Paul claims to have been a Troublemaker, yet he also confirms the trouble‑maker card was in the center, implying that the card he held was swapped away.  Such a discrepancy points toward deception and makes Paul the most likely werewolf or at least a liar.

Furthermore, many participants suspect Paul, and Justin even proposes to target him. Given the lack of confirmation of any other werewolf identity, voting for Paul maximizes the chance of eliminating a werewolf.
